problem id: 20052c2f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) OR SHR(7)

examples:
  10010110 -> 11010011
  01110011 -> 01101110
  11110011 -> 01111111
  10010011 -> 01110011
  11010001 -> 00111011
  11001000 -> 00011001
  11101100 -> 10011101
  11011000 -> 00011011
  01111010 -> 01001111

query: 00110011
predicted answer: 01100110
